title: Cobblemon Trials Edition - Default Datapack
description: This is a datapack that includes the default structure files for the Cobblemon Trials Edition Mod.
body:
This is a Datapack for Cobblemon Trials Edition (https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-trials-edition), that includes the files for the default structures the mod already includes.

**The Primary purpose of this Datapack is for others to modify. it is NOT required for the mod to function properly.**

The files this includes are for the following structures:
- Minecraft Monster Rooms (in features folder)
- Minecraft Abandoned Mineshafts
- Minecraft Nether Fortresses
- Minecraft Bastion Remnants
- Minecraft Trial Chambers
- Minecraft Strongholds
- Cobblemon Shipwreck Coves

The loot tables are also included for these structures.
